Server Sync E2E Test Page

We have spent two decades optimising software for speed of delivery. Continuous deployment and feature flags have collapsed the distance between an idea and its appearance in production.

But speed has a shadow. When the cost of shipping is low, the cost of thinking is paid less often. Features accumulate and interfaces grow.

Slowing down does not mean shipping less. It means inserting deliberation between impulse and action. It means asking whether a feature should exist before asking how it should be built.
